name: Polenta with Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 1-1/2-quart casserole dish.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan, mix the cornmeal and cold water until smooth.
4. Stir in the boiling water and salt. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
5. Reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat and stir until smooth.
7. Spread one-third of the mixture into the casserole dish. Dot with 1 teaspoon margarine.
8. Sprinkle with 1/3 cup Parmesan cheese.
9. Repeat steps 6-8 twice more.
10. Sprinkle with Swiss cheese.
11. Bake, uncovered, for 15 to 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
12. Yield: 6 servings (about 3/4 cup each); 125 calories per serving.
